title: ruppia maritima var. spiralis
intro: Ruppia maritima var. spiralis is a type of aquatic plant, commonly known as the spiralis sea lavender or spiral sea lavender, which is a variety of the Ruppia maritima. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ruppia maritima var. spiralis include treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
